abstract: Take a data blob and looks for OBEX headers.

declaration.code: func OBEXGetHeaders(_ inData: UnsafeRawPointer!, _ inDataSize: Int) -> CFDictionary!

overview:
## Return Value

A CFDictionary with the headers found in the data blob inside it.

## Discussion

You should use this when your callback for PUTs, GETs, etc. give you a data chunk and a size. Pass these params to this function and you will receive a dictionary back full of the parse headers. You can use the CFDictionary calls to get objects out of it, based on the header keys defined above. You are responsible for releasing the CFDictionary returned to you. Example usage:

items.description: Add bytes representing an application parameter to a dictionary of OBEX headers.
items.name: OBEXAddApplicationParameterHeader(_:_:_:)

items.description: Add an authorization challenge header to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddAuthorizationChallengeHeader(_:_:_:)

items.description: Add an authorization Response header to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddAuthorizationResponseHeader(_:_:_:)

items.description: Add bytes of data to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddBodyHeader(_:_:_:_:)

items.description: Add a byte sequence header to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddByteSequenceHeader(_:_:_:)

items.description: Add bytes representing a connection ID to a dictionary of OBEX headers.
items.name: OBEXAddConnectionIDHeader(_:_:_:)

items.description: Add a CFStringRef to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddCountHeader(_:_:)

items.description: Add a CFStringRef to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddDescriptionHeader(_:_:)

items.description: Add bytes of data to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddHTTPHeader(_:_:_:)

items.description: Add a CFStringRef to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddLengthHeader(_:_:)

items.description: Add a CFStringRef to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddNameHeader(_:_:)

items.description: Add an object class header to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddObjectClassHeader(_:_:_:)

items.description: Add bytes of data to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddTargetHeader(_:_:_:)

items.description: Add a CFStringRef to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddTime4ByteHeader(_:_:)

items.description: Add bytes to a dictionary of OBEXheaders.
items.name: OBEXAddTimeISOHeader(_:_:_:)

title: OBEXGetHeaders(_:_:)
